headline: Steris (STE) Stock After Q4 Miss And 2027 Outlook What The Valuation Signals Now
summary: STERIS (STE) is back in focus after reporting fourth quarter fiscal 2026 results, with adjusted earnings per share of US$2.83 missing consensus by 0.9% and revenue growth of 7.3% coming in slightly under estimates. See our latest analysis for STERIS. At a share price of US$207.22, STERIS has seen its 1-day, 7-day, 30-day and 90-day share price returns all move lower, and the year to date share price return is down 17.1%, while the 1-year total shareholder return is down 13.6%. This is despite...
